top_findings.summary: The skill requests access to Bash, Grep, and Glob tools which allow arbitrary file system navigation, command execution, and pattern matching across the entire system. As an A/B testing design and analysis specialist focused on providing guidance, templates, and statistical calculations, these broad system-level permissions are excessive for its stated purpose of creating test designs and analyzing results. The skill could function effectively with only Read/Write/Edit permissions for documentation purposes, without needing to execute commands or search through arbitrary files.
